content:
Story-based creative competitions.
Odysseus (Strategic Thinking).


✅ Why This Works:
• Gives a final showcase for different intellectual strengths.
• Ties back into class-wide game mechanics.
• Allows XP to be spent meaningfully in a high-stakes environment.

📌 Version 5.0: Final Questions Before Ultimate Lock-In

1. Should Mastery Exam Failures Be Announced to the Class (Public Consequence) or Kept Private?

✔ Public Failures add tension, but private keeps pressure low.
✔ Compromise: Leaderboard system where names are anonymous, but rankings are visible.

2. Should Redemption Paths Have Limited Attempts Per Semester?
